Right along the brushline under the trees is a copse of raspberry & blackberry bushes Falling Fruit season: June-August.

Right alongside the road is a set of stairs that lead to where a house used to be. The firehall sits across the street. In the shade of the trees are raspberries, black and fresh. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
